name: Vercel
description: Vercel provides serverless deployment, edge functions, and domain management for frontend applications and full-stack projects. Use this API to manage projects, trigger deployments from Git repositories, configure custom domains, and manage environment variables across preview, development, and production environments.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: List all projects in your Vercel account. Returns project names, IDs, frameworks, and latest deployment status.

capabilities.name: get_project
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific project by ID or name, including framework, build settings, and linked Git repository.

capabilities.name: list_deployments
capabilities.description: List deployments, optionally filtered by project. Returns deployment URLs, states, creation timestamps, and Git metadata.

capabilities.name: create_deployment
capabilities.description: Create a new deployment from a Git source. Specify the project name, Git repository, branch, and optional build settings.

capabilities.name: list_domains
capabilities.description: List all domains in your Vercel account. Returns domain names, verification status, and configuration details.

capabilities.name: add_domain
capabilities.description: Add a custom domain to a Vercel project. The domain will need DNS configuration to point to Vercel's servers.

capabilities.name: get_environment_variables
capabilities.description: Get all environment variables for a project. Returns variable keys, values, and target environments (production, preview, development).

capabilities.name: set_environment_variable
capabilities.description: Create or update an environment variable for a project. Specify the key, value, and which environments (production, preview, development) it applies to.
